comment: Canonical manifest of LLM model files that DazzleEdge.chatAgent(model: .gemma3nE2B) knows how to download. Pinned URLs + SHA256 so every consumer gets the exact same weights. Updating requires bumping `version` here so caches invalidate on-device.

gemma-4-E2B-it.comment: Gemma 4 E2B Instruction-Tuned, quantized for LiteRT-LM. Same artifact used in the existing research experiments. Target model for the on-ramp bundle.

llama-3.2-3B-instruct.comment: Slimmer alternative when 2.4 GB of Gemma is too much. Same runtime.

qwen-2.5-1.5b-instruct.comment: Smallest shipped model. Prefer for low-end devices (<3 GB RAM).

comment_on_sha256: The SHA256 fields are intentionally placeholders. The first time DazzleEdge downloads a model, it computes the hash and either (a) writes it back here via a CI pipeline that pinned the expected value, or (b) logs the observed hash so a maintainer can audit and update the manifest. Never trust a first-fetch hash blindly — always compare against a value signed by the SDK maintainer's release pipeline.

storage_layout.comment: cacheDir so the OS can reclaim the file under storage pressure; the SDK re-downloads on next use. Use a version subdirectory so a manifest bump invalidates stale files without a migration step.
